name: hatch-pet-plus
description: Create custom animated Codex pets — any mascot, any style. Turn a text concept or your own character art into a fully animated pet: base sprite, 9 animation rows, 16 look directions, then despill, validate and package a v2 8x11 spritesheet.

interface.shortDescription: Create custom animated Codex pets — any mascot, any style
interface.longDescription: Build a Codex-compatible animated pet from a concept, character art, generated images, or a brand's visual system. The mascot can be a creature, an object, a plant, a shape or a company mascot — it does not have to be an animal. Nine style presets: pixel, plush, clay, sticker, flat-vector, 3d-toy, painterly, brand-inspired, and auto. Generates the base, all 9 animation rows and the 16 look directions, then assembles, despills, validates and packages a v2 8x11 spritesheet ready for ~/.codex/pets/. Includes hardened chroma despilling (every style needs it) and gaze-direction guidance learned the hard way.
defaultPrompt: Make me a Codex pet: a pot-bellied terracotta jar-creature, claymation style
Turn this character art into a Codex pet
Create a plush mascot pet for my company
